docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARAMBULA, ALBERTO AKA AL GOMEZ ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER , SENT TO PLAINTIFF
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-24-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JASMINE

COURT CERTIFIED MAIL OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM RETURNED UNSERVED (THE GREEN CARD WAS REMOVED FROM THE COURT'S CERTIFIED MAIL, BUT THE CLAIM WAS LATER REJECTED BY THE POST OFFICE-MOVED-NOT FORWARDABLE.) AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JASMINE
CORRESPONDENCE MOTHER OF DEFENDANT RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JASMINE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ARAMBULA, ALBERTO AKA AL GOMEZ AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JASMINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 1/24/2013 TO JASMINE CSTILLO.
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO ALBERTI ARANBULA.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JASMINE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-22-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY HER MOTHER SHIRLEY CASTILL, WHO BROUGHT A LETTER FROM THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
